overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a sunlit medieval European city with cobblestone streets, stone archways, and colorful townhouses. The character moves from a narrow street through a monumental arch into an open town square bustling with NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with colorful townhouses

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily down a narrow cobblestone street toward a large stone archway, passing NPCs in medieval dress

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large ornate stone archway marking the end of the street
pink stucco building with purple flowering bushes in planters
weathered stone pillar at street corner with red flowers
terracotta pots with bright red flowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow sunlit cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings. A pink townhouse with flowering bushes stands on the right, while ahead looms a large decorative archway. A woman in a yellow dress walks past as the character approaches the arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered archway passage transitioning between street sections

events.description: entering the shadow of the stone archway, lighting becomes darker and more diffused
exiting the archway into a brighter, wider street section

agents.ego_description: Geralt passing through the stone archway, moving from shadow back into sunlight

entered.detail: light-colored stone building with arched windows
building facade covered in green climbing vines

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the shadowed interior of the stone archway, experiencing a brief lighting change from bright sun to cool shadow. Upon exiting, the street opens slightly revealing cream-colored buildings and ivy-covered walls as the archway recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cobblestone street with colorful Mediterranean-style buildings

events.description: street widens significantly with more open sky and distant towers visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the wider street, passing various townspeople and approaching a more open plaza area

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: bright yellow building with shuttered windows
tall tower with spire visible in the distance
warm orange stucco building with arched doorways

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the scene opens into a wider sunlit street with colorful Mediterranean architecture. Yellow and orange buildings line the left side while the path curves gently toward a distant tower. The cobblestone street remains consistent but the space feels more open and airy.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with grand staircase and coastal view

events.description: entering the main town plaza with a large building featuring stone stairs and balcony

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the bustling town square, passing various NPCs including a woman in a purple dress

notable_agents.action: woman in elaborate purple dress and hat walking down stairs

entered.detail: grand stone building with wide staircase and balustrade
balcony heavily draped with green vines and purple flowers
patterned cobblestone paving of the town square

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vibrant open town square dominated by a grand stone building with stairs and vine-covered balconies on the right. The plaza is populated with various townspeople including a woman in a striking purple dress. The space opens toward a coastal view in the distance, with the cobblestone street expanding into a wide public gathering area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, sunlit residential street through a monumental gateway and into a bustling open town square. It begins with Geralt walking past a pink townhouse and flowering bushes along a cobblestone path, moving toward a large decorative archway as a woman in a yellow dress passes by. As the character enters the arch, the lighting shifts briefly from bright sunlight to cool shadow before emerging into a more open area characterized by cream-colored buildings and ivy-covered walls. The scene then expands into a wider street lined with vibrant yellow and orange Mediterranean architecture that curves gently toward a distant tower. Finally, the path opens completely into a wide public plaza populated by townspeople, including a woman in a purple dress, with the view extending past a grand vine-covered building toward the distant coast.
